рЯЧЇпЄП Setting:

Rowan and Calder were fated mates before they were even twenty. Leading the Wolfe pack together. But something had always been missing in their marriage - something vital. A hollow ache neither of them could soothe. They needed someone who would melt under RowanвАЩs gentle dominance and call him daddy. Someone who would be a perfect, obedient thing for Calder to ruin. That something... was someone. And they didnвАЩt know until they found their second fated mate: you.
